cap.reality_value.health.tip.low: [!]You are sick. Please quickly restore your health using items like herbs and bandages.
cap.reality_value.sanity.tip.low: [!]You are on the verge of a mental breakdown, please restore your sanity through activities such as fishing and flower picking as soon as possible
tooltip.reality_value.herb: There is a 15% chance of grass (grass, tall grass, fern, large fern) being destroyed and falling. After consumption, it will restore 2 points of health and 0-1 point of wellness
tooltip.reality_value.bandage: Crafted from herbs and ragged cloth, restores 4 health and 1–3 wellness upon consumption.
tooltip.reality_value.stimulant: Dropped by killing zombies with a 0.5% probability; restores 1–3 sanity upon consumption.
tooltip.reality_value.high_sugar_chocola: Restores 7 sanity, loses 3 wellness, and grants Slowness II for 2 minutes.
tooltip.reality_value.antibiotics: There is a 1% chance of dropping moss blocks, which can restore 8 points of health and 4-7 points of health after consumption. Corresponding side effects can be obtained for 30 seconds after use
tooltip.reality_value.epinephrine: After killing zombies, there is a 0.1% chance of dropping it. After consumption, it will restore 16 points of health and 5-9 points of health. After use, it will receive corresponding side effects for 1 minute
tooltip.reality_value.highly_concentrate: Restore 2-5 points of rationality after consumption
tooltip.reality_value.vanilla: There is a 5% chance of grass (grass, tall grass, fern, large fern) being destroyed and falling. After consumption, it will restore 2 points of health and 0-1 point of sanity
